zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Catherine de Rohan於1414年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，她的父親Alain DE ROHAN IX32歲，母親Marguerite De Bretagne22歲。她於大約1420年與Jean d'Albret在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 艾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1471年3月24日在法國巴-納瓦享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Catherine de Rohan于1414年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，她的父亲Alain DE ROHAN IX32岁，母亲Marguerite De Bretagne22岁。她于大约1420年与Jean d'Albret在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 艾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1471年3月24日在法国巴-納瓦享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Jean .

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Catherine de Rohan was born in 1414, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Alain DE ROHAN IX, was 32 and her mother, Marguerite De Bretagne, was 22. She married Jean d'Albret about 1420, in La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 March 1471, in Basse-Navarre, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Catherine de Rohan est née en 1414, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain DE ROHAN IX, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marguerite De Bretagne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Jean d'Albret environ 1420, à La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1471, à Basse-Navarre, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Sie hat um 1420 in La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich Jean d'Albret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. März 1471 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Basse-Navarre, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Jean d'Albret circa 1420, nel La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 marzo 1471, nel Basse-Navarre, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Catherine de Rohan(이)가 1414년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain DE ROHAN IX(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite De Bretagne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 라 che즈에서 Jean d'Albret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 3월 24일 프랑스 배세-나바르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Catherine de Rohan родилась в 1414 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain DE ROHAN IX было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite De Bretagne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean d'Albret около 1420 г. в местности ла чeз, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 марта 1471 г. в местности бассе-наварр, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Jean d'Albret aproximadamente 1420, en La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1471, en Baja Navarra, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
